title: Bhuna Corn Fritters
description: A spicy twist on classic corn fritters, featuring the bold flavors of bhuna. Perfect for a snack or appetizer.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine crushed tortilla, corn, and salt. Mix well.
Add bhuna and spicy to the bowl and mix until combined.
Gradually add water to the bowl and mix until a thick batter forms.
Heat a non-stick pan with a small amount of oil over medium heat.
Using a spoon, drop small amounts of the batter into the pan.
Cook for 2-3 minutes on each side, until golden brown.
Serve hot with your favorite dipping sauce.
